advantages: Purpose-built containers make common tasks (counting, grouping, queues) concise and fast.
deque gives O(1) operations at both ends, unlike list at the front.
frozen dataclasses provide immutable, hashable value objects for config and keys.
disadvantages: defaultdict silently creates keys on read, which can mask bugs.
dataclasses still need field(default_factory=...) to avoid shared mutable defaults.
For complex validation, libraries like pydantic may be a better fit than plain dataclasses.
